# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This project is actively maintained on the latest version available in the `main` branch.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | :-------: |
| Latest (`main`) | ✅ |

---

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do **not** open a public issue.

Instead, report it by:

- Opening a GitHub Security Advisory (if enabled), or
- Contacting the repository owner through GitHub.

Please include:

- A description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce it
- Any proof-of-concept (if applicable)

I will acknowledge the report as soon as possible and work on a fix.

Thank you for helping improve the security of this project.
